productDisplayName: Skechers Women Grey & White Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThis Fitness Junkie shoe is a part of skechers Shape-Ups line and aims to tone your body muscles just with its use. This pair is designed to activate your lower body muscles, burn calories and improve circulation just by using it for walking. The upraised heel design makes it a great looking shoe. Use this shoe for a quick grocery run or a morning walk. It comes with a booklet on healthy eating, an instruction manual and a fitness DVD. Product DetailsMesh upper with synthetic overlays, a padded inner and tongue and central lace-upsAntibacterial sockliner that wicks away moisture/sweat and increases breathabilityTwo-part, firm and soft-density midsole that delivers a rocking effect during the natural strideResamex kinetic wedge technology engineered below the midsole to give every stride a natural transitionA high abrasion rubber outsole with rubber treads to maximize traction and cushioning Material and CareSynthetic, meshRemove dirt with a clean cloth
